channel.title: Global Dispatch: Shadow of Trust
channel.itunes:author: Eslam
channel.description: Investigative reports on global trends and hidden truths.

item.title: Love in the Time of Deceit #RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust (Ep. v11)
item.description:
This podcast episode delves into the world of romance scams and the betrayal of trust, exploring four unique stories of deception and heartbreak. From fake soldiers to manipulative friends, these stories highlight the importance of staying vigilant and protecting oneself from the dangers of online scams.
🔍 Keywords: romance scams, betrayal of trust, online safety, deception, heartbreak
#RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineSafety #Deception #Heartbreak

item.title: Love in the Dark: Romance Scams and Betrayal of Trust #RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating (Ep. v10)
item.description:
Join us as we explore the world of romance scams and the betrayal of trust, where love and deception collide in unexpected ways.
🔍 Keywords: romance scams, online dating, betrayal of trust, true crime
#RomanceScams #BetrayalOfTrust #OnlineDating #TrueCrime

item.title: Shadow of Trust - Episode 1
item.itunes:author: Eslam
item.description: First episode of the Global Dispatch series.
